name: Pistachio Candy
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces Box Vanilla Pudding mix (NOT instant)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease an 8 x 13-inch cake pan or candy molds.
2. Set aside.
3. In a medium saucepan, combine the pudding mix, sugar and evaporated milk. Stir to combine.
4. Over medium heat, bring mixture to a boil. Continue boiling for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the butter and flavoring until desired color is reached.
6. Pour mixture into a medium bowl. Beat on high speed with an electric mixer for 4-5 minutes or until mixture thickens and is no longer glossy.
7. Fold in the pistachio nuts.
8. Pour mixture into candy molds, or into the greased pan.
9. Refrigerate until firm.
10. Wrap candy pieces in plastic wrap, or if available, colored paper. If using a cake pan, cut into squares.
11. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
